form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding (Lather Up - Claire Bear) making his debut. Shaping up nicely.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Three-year-old gelding (Lather Up - Claire Bear) making his debut. Shaping up nicely.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth behind Picasso at Wyndham Raceway over 2400m in a 3yo+ on March 29 at $117.40. Then a handy effort when beaten by 5.5 m finishing second behind Shiver In The Dark at Ascot Park Raceway over 2200m in a 3yo+ on April 2 at $42.70. Can improve. With further progress is a winning chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up early stages of the run home.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after two weeks. Lacklustre first-up performance when 7th (Fr2) over 2200m at Ascot Park Raceway, beaten 18 m by Shiver In The Dark (2:45.10) in 3yo+ on April 2 at $11.20. This will fully test.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding by Fear The Dragon out of A New Sensation having his first start. Showed ability when he won at Ascot Park Raceway in a trial on February 27 over 2200m. Strong trial form coming into this.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run he 7th (Fr5) over 1609m at this track beaten 21 m by Side Hustle (1:52.70) in 2yo+ on December 14 at $26.40. Sure to play a major role.

form.formComment: Three-year-old colt by Terror To Love out of Lite Jagermeister on debut. Finished fifth at Central Southland Raceway in a trial on October 10 over 1609m. Profiles well and despite the draw is expected to measure up.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr7) over 1609m at this track beaten 30 m by Rocknroll Ivy (1:56.90) on March 26 at $21. Two runs back 11th (Fr4) over 1700m at Gore Raceway beaten 24 m by The Dancer (2:04.30) in 3yo+ on March 19 at $18.60. Not going well enough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lay out leaving the final bend.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Sr3) over 2200m at Ascot Park Raceway beaten 18 m by Shiver In The Dark (2:45.10) in 3yo+ on April 2 at $84.60. Two runs back 5th (Fr1) over 2400m at Wyndham Raceway well beaten by Side Hustle (3:03.50) in 3yo CG on March 29 at $54.10. Not keen on his chances in this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up early to middle stages of the run home.
Broke as the start was effected losing ground.
Paced roughly in the score up and was out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 6 m finishing third behind The Dancer at Gore Raceway over 1700m in a 3yo+ on March 19 at $15.20. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Picasso at Wyndham Raceway over 2400m in a 3yo+ on March 29 at $15.90. Sure to be there at the business end.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced three wide without cover from the 1100m.
Over-raced in the early and middle stages. Raced wide from the 700m.
Broke in the score up and out of position at the start.
